name: Pumpkin Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients into a large bowl.
2. Stir in the milk, pumpkin, and apple butter.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
5. Spoon 1/3 cup of batter for each pancake onto a heated griddle or pan.
6. Brown and flip the pancakes when ready.
